seoTitle: Cavan vs Cawdor — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cavan and Cawdor. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cavan and Cawdor.
heading: Cavan vs Cawdor — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cavan, New South Wales and Cawdor, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cavan has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Cawdor (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cavan or Cawdor safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cavan has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Cawdor scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cavan scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Cawdor scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cavan or Cawdor?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cavan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
